summary: Test suite covers core matrix generation requirements (cartesian products, excludes, includes, size limits) and includes both unit and integration layers. Strengths: well-organized Pester 5 tests, comprehensive workflow structure validation, proper error case assertions. Weaknesses: integration harness (Invoke-ActHarness.ps1) is monolithic and uses fragile regex-based output parsing; missing edge cases (type validation, special characters, malformed JSON, extreme sizes); hardcoded fixture expectations reduce maintainability; limited assertion on partial match semantics and key collision handling. Would catch basic regressions but might miss data validation and performance issues.
